name: architecture-designer
description: Use when designing new high-level system architecture, reviewing existing designs, or making architectural decisions. Invoke to create architecture diagrams, write Architecture Decision Records (ADRs), evaluate technology trade-offs, design component interactions, and plan for scalability. Use for system design, architecture review, microservices structuring, ADR authoring, scalability planning, and infrastructure pattern selection — distinct from code-level design patterns or database-only desi
author: jeffallan
summary_zh: 这是一个专注系统顶层设计的架构助手，帮你在搭建新系统、架构评审或做技术决策时理清思路，搞定微服务拆分、技术选型与扩展规划等系统级难题，而不局限于代码或单库细节。
